titleStmt.title: SII 27.341: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 341. (A.R. No. 248 of 1931-32.) HĀNĒHAḶḶI, (SAME AS MŪḌAKĒRI) UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab lying in front of the house of Lakshmī-nārāyaṇa-śāstri near the Sōmanātha temple.

This damaged record registers gifts of land, made after purchase, by the people and the four sēnabōvas of Hanneyahaḷi to the good Sōmanātha for feeding twelve brāhmaṇas in the maṭha attached to it. It also records gifts made to the several temple servants for their services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gilli
ṁnaṁ naḍa
yiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
dalu mūḍe medago ḷi
haḍiyāṟana mūladagadde
yiṁdaṁ baḍagaṇa Āṭeyabāḷa gadde 1 kke
yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu mūḍalu dīvara naḍigeya teṁ
hosagade 5 ke bittuva mūḍe 8 ... sōmanātha dēvara dēvasva
kalu gadde 1 kaṁ bittuva mūḍe 1 ... mūḍa tōṭadiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
ṁḍila gadde 1 kaṁ bittuva mūḍe 2 baḍaga paḍuvaṇa tōṭa mara phala
ya catussīmeya vivara hasavi seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
ya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu makkiya baresahitavāgi teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīme
yoḷagaṇa Āttiyagadde 1 kkaṁ bittuvamūḍe 2 bajakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mattaṁ bajakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ te
ṁkalu Arasu heggaḍeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yidara baḷaguḷa teṁgina tōṭa mane maneṭhāu keṟe bhāvi sahita
śōbhana keṟeya hattiraṇa tōṭa sahitavāgi Aṁjana haḷiya bayala catussīmeya vivara Arasu heggaḍe
ya mūladagaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu harida hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu kaṁmāṟa sāli
ṁdaṁ haṭṭiyana baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa bayalu bittuva mūḍe 5
Aṁtu bayalu bittuva bedegaṇagalu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 30 AlliUḷa mara pala sahitavāgi yi bāḷiṁda ba
ha gēṇiya Akkimūḍe 63 maṭhada hodōṭada catussīmeya vivara ṭhakkurara maṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ basa
viseṭṭiya maṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu dēvālyakke hōha rājabīdiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu dēviyara ma
ṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ cōkaṁṇa seṭṭiya hōdōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ seṭṭikāṟa sōvaṁṇa seṭṭiya hovina
tōṭadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu kalla magiliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa chatrada maṭha tō
ṭa tōṭada Oḷagaṇa teṁgina marana gēṇiyiṁda baha Akkimūḍe 3 Aṁtu battada hāne 3 rave Akki nā
gaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 176 bāpaḍiya bāḷiṁge sōmanātha dēvarige dhūpakke teṟuva dēvasva kā
ṭi ga 1 dēvasvada baḷiya gadde 1 Adaṟa koḍaṇa koravi 2 kke bhaṁḍiya maṭhada teṁka dēvālyadalu
pūrvvadiṁda Agrakke naḍasuva dēvasva nāgaṁḍugadalu bhatta mūḍe 12ke dēlūra bāḷiṁge Arasu
heggaḍege teṟava kaṭṭuṁdeṟu muṁḍāmuṁḍi ga 2 Aṁjana haḷiya bāḷiṁge hoṁneya heggaḍege
teṟuva kaṭṭuṁdeṟu muṁḍāmuṁḍi ga 0 . guḷiya gade 1 kke mūṟu mūḍe kuḷāgrada teṟanū hoṁne
ya haḷiya Ūrunālvarū sthaḷada sēnabōvanū Arththaparitsēdavāgi koṁḍu mūlaparitsēdavāgi sa
rvva mānyavāgi kāyidu baṁdaru Aṁtu teṟu dēvasvakke Akkimūḍe 8 nuḷiye śuddha Akki mū
kkaṁ dharmmada vivara chatrada maṭhadalu Aṭṭuvaru sahitavāgi brāhmara bhōjanada jana 12 kke mūḍe 120
sōmanātha dēvarige rudrābhiṣēkavamāḍi maṭhadalu Uṁḍigeya biḍuva brāhmaṇaja 1 kke Akki mūḍe 1
sōmanātha dēvarige Udayada mosarōgarada Upārakke masarusahita Akkimūḍe 12 naṁdādīvige dhū
pāratige Akkimūḍe 7 hūvina tōṭava māḍuvadakke Akkimūḍe 10 hūvina koyidavariṁge Akkamūḍe
2 maṭhada kasava tegevadakke Akkimūḍe 1 jaṭila ṁḍu maṭhada sakatiyanikkuvage Akkimūḍe 1 . brāhmarige śani
vārada yeṁṇe sīgeyakāyi sahita Akki mūḍe 5 Aṁtu dharmadaveccakke naḍava Akki mūḍe 1
kedēlūralu bajakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu śōbhanakeṟeya mēlaṇa teṁgina tōṭa mane kaḷaniṁda
ṁ baḍagalu hoṁneya heggaḍeya tōṭadiṁda mūḍalu Arasu heggaḍeya beṁmaṁṇa
koṭhāriya gaḍiyalu yattadakaḷiya baresahitavāgi teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷage makki
bittuva mūḍe 2 nū beṁmaṁṇaseṭi Arasu hegaḍeya kayyalu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍu koṭṭaru
kkige sōmanātha dēvarige Arasu heggaḍe kārttikamāsada baṁdu dinada pūjage māḍida dharmmakke kāṭiga 1 nū
maṭhada dharmmagūḍi naḍasi baharu yi dharmmada bāḷiṁge śrīma
kopparige 1 kke ceṁ le 1 taṁbuge
baraha . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭivvaruṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyā jāyatē krimi . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāśrēyōnu pā
lanaṁ dānāsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . I darmmake Ārōbaru tapidavaru
vāraṇāsiyali sāvira kavileya koṁda pāpa . dharmamāḍidavarige
maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.341 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
